message.content:
{
  "page_type": "text_scan",
  "summary": "This page is a text-based specification sheet for the SC-BGWNA-B product, describing a function that indicates the total non-allocated power consumption of the entire gateway as a cumulative object. It specifies the value range (0 to 999999), unit (0.1 kWh), rollover behavior (resets to 0 after exceeding 999999), and update intervals (every 1, 4, 8, 12, or 24 hours starting from midnight).",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "document_header", "label": "SC-BGWNA-B 产品规格书 版本 2.0"},
    {"type": "document_identifier", "label": "资料编号: ISTZ09029 修订版 A"},
    {"type": "document_date", "label": "2010年6月1日"},
    {"type": "paragraph", "label": "Power consumption function description"},
    {"type": "paragraph", "label": "Update interval description"},
    {"type": "page_number", "label": "50"},
    {"type": "website_footer", "label": "制冷百家网: www.zhilengbj.cn"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["product_specifications", "energy_monitoring_parameters", "gateway_functionality"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "SC-BGWNA-B 产品规格书 版本 2.0\n资料编号: ISTZ09029 修订版 A 2010年6月1日\n该功能指示了作为累计对象的整个网关的非分配电力总功耗量。功耗量值的范围为 0 到999999。该值的单位是 0.1kwh。如果该值超过 999999，那么它将返回 0 并继续从 0 开始算起。\n在进行计算时，也就是从凌晨 0:00 开始，每 1 小时、4 小时、8 小时、12 小时或 24 小时对该值进行更新（请参考 2.4）。\n以上\n50\n制冷百家网: www.zhilengbj.cn",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The text references '2.4' for update interval details, but that section is not visible on this page. The exact context of 'non-allocated power consumption' (非分配电力总功耗量) within the broader system is not visually defined here.",
  "confidence": 0.95
}

parsed.summary: This page is a text-based specification sheet for the SC-BGWNA-B product, describing a function that indicates the total non-allocated power consumption of the entire gateway as a cumulative object. It specifies the value range (0 to 999999), unit (0.1 kWh), rollover behavior (resets to 0 after exceeding 999999), and update intervals (every 1, 4, 8, 12, or 24 hours starting from midnight).

visual_entities.label: SC-BGWNA-B 产品规格书 版本 2.0
资料编号: ISTZ09029 修订版 A

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
SC-BGWNA-B 产品规格书 版本 2.0
资料编号: ISTZ09029 修订版 A 2010年6月1日
该功能指示了作为累计对象的整个网关的非分配电力总功耗量。功耗量值的范围为 0 到999999。该值的单位是 0.1kwh。如果该值超过 999999，那么它将返回 0 并继续从 0 开始算起。
在进行计算时，也就是从凌晨 0:00 开始，每 1 小时、4 小时、8 小时、12 小时或 24 小时对该值进行更新（请参考 2.4）。
以上
50
制冷百家网: www.zhilengbj.cn
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The text references '2.4' for update interval details, but that section is not visible on this page. The exact context of 'non-allocated power consumption' (非分配电力总功耗量) within the broader system is not visually defined here.
